name: robntex
description: **RobNTex** (ROBIN eXecution) takes the manual grind out of **executing test cases** against the ROBIN Revenue Cycle Management platform. You keep authoring TCs the way you already do (Markdown or Excel); RobNTex reads them, drives the ROBIN portal in a real browser, captures **per-step evidence**, and produces a **Jira-ready defect report** linked back to your TC-IDs.
